Leadership

The Team Building the
Future of Healthcare.

The InPursuit Health leadership team brings together decades of experience building mission-critical data infrastructure, enterprise software platforms, and national-scale information systems. Our founders, executive leadership, and advisory team have led programs supporting global enterprises, federal agencies, healthcare organizations, and emerging technology companies. Today that experience is focused on one of the most important challenges in modern healthcare: building the secure interoperability, orchestration, and governance infrastructure required for AI-driven healthcare ecosystems. Together, the team behind InPursuit Health is building the foundational data fabric that enables patient-centered healthcare at scale.

Founders

The Founders of InPursuit Health

InPursuit Health was founded by leaders who have spent decades building mission-critical data infrastructure for governments, national security organizations, and global enterprises — now applied to healthcare interoperability and AI orchestration.

Bennett McPhatter
Co-Founder & CEO
USMC Veteran

Creator of TETRA™ and pioneer in scalable distributed intelligence systems, link analysis, and anomaly detection. Former USMC Intelligence NCO leading architecture and program execution for mission‑critical platforms deployed globally.

Hongda
Co-Founder & Chief Technology Officer

Enterprise platform architect with 25+ years building large-scale software and federated search/data mining solutions for intelligence and law enforcement. MS Computer Systems — University of Maryland.

Chris Ingram
Co-Founder & Chief Product Officer

Chief Product Officer and creator of TETRA Forecast™, a predictive modeling engine using neural networks and advanced ML. Former VP at MSCI; BS Computer Engineering (Michigan) and MBA (Florida).

Patrick Truxillo
Co-Founder & Chief Strategy Officer

Healthcare interoperability strategist focused on connecting fragmented systems into usable insights. Leads InPursuit Health strategy to build a patient-centered AI platform that helps individuals own and use their health data.

Executive Leadership

Executive Leadership

A multidisciplinary team spanning clinical leadership, go-to-market, AI governance, and enterprise delivery — built to scale the infrastructure layer healthcare depends on.

Dr. Joseph M. Chalil
Chief Medical Officer
U.S. Navy Veteran

Global healthcare executive with 20+ years in health policy, medical affairs, and clinical development at DBV Technologies, Boehringer Ingelheim, Abbott, and Roche. Holds three U.S. patents. IAOTP Top Physician of the Year. Best-selling author and Adjunct Professor at Nova Southeastern University.

Jose Arrieta
Chief Innovation Officer

Former U.S. Federal Chief Data Officer and national leader in data modernization and AI strategy. Known for pioneering blockchain-based supply chain transparency during the COVID response and advancing secure data interoperability across federal agencies.

Michael Mark
CRO — VBC

Veteran executive with decades of experience building enterprise partnerships and driving growth in complex regulated markets. Leads strategic development and value-based care initiatives across the InPursuit ecosystem.

Alison Cossette
Chief AI Officer

Internationally recognized expert in Responsible AI, graph data science, and provenance systems. Advises organizations on trustworthy AI architectures and data governance strategies that align advanced AI systems with real-world decision environments.

Executive Leadership Continued

Operational Execution

Focused leadership to scale delivery, financial readiness, and operational cadence — ensuring InPursuit executes at enterprise velocity.

Andy Hathorn
Chief Financial Officer

Chief Financial Officer with 15+ years of operational accounting experience, specializing in FP&A as a tool for strategic alignment and executive decision making.

Jeff Sirianni
Chief Operations Officer

Technology and operations leader. Former Director of Ops at Embody, Inc., helping scale the company from start-up to its $275M acquisition. Brings deep expertise in operational scaling, product deployment, and execution for growth-stage companies.

Ecosystem

Strategic Partners & Advisory Board

Strategic Partners
WellLink
Strategic Partner
Healthcare GPO & Distribution Network
WellLink
Strategic Partner
Healthcare GPO & Distribution Network
WellLink is an enormous value-add strategic partner and a vested equity stakeholder in InPursuit Health (1% ownership). As a major group purchasing and distribution organization, WellLink strengthens InPursuit’s go-to-market reach and enterprise credibility — accelerating adoption across provider networks and healthcare infrastructure partners.
“WellLink is excited to be an incubator and advisory partner of InPursuit's innovative healthcare solutions. The lack of interoperability has created a disjointed healthcare system, riddled with inefficiencies that can delay critical care, drive up costs, and compromise patient outcomes. We are excited to be part shaping and delivering a better healthcare ecosystem with InPursuit Health."
Advisory Board
Alexis Johnson
MSN Health Leadership & Management

ER Nurse, Professor, Regional Director of Operations for a significant Health System. Currently serving as National Director of Integrations at US Health Partners. Brings frontline clinical perspective to InPursuit’s advisory team.

WellLink™
via CEO Brian Lane

WellLink™ is a pioneering convener linking individuals, organizations, and communities to advance holistic health and wellness solutions nationwide. A strategic partner in expanding InPursuit’s community health reach.

David M. Janet
Legal Advisor: Healthcare & IP Licensing
Member, Fletcher, Heald & Hildreth, P.L.C.

Over two decades of practice in technology transactions, data security, and IP licensing. Represents healthcare technology companies in software licensing, data integration, HIPAA-related agreements, and government contracting. Duke Law graduate with deep expertise advising health-tech startups through complex regulatory and commercial landscapes.
